use_cases: Displaying status labels with semantic variants like default, secondary, destructive, or outline styles
Showing category tags or metadata in compact form
Indicating counts or numeric badges with color-coded variants
Creating pill-shaped labels for UI elements requiring visual categorization
ai_summary: A lightweight Badge component from shadcn/ui with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying labels, tags, and status indicators. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent theming and includes accessibility-focused focus rings. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for any industry or platform.
